title: Blobby Mod
description:
Add’s a new biome in the void dimension.
It also gives you a new Boss in swamps.
body:
# Features



With this mod you can get a new boss in swamps, and try falling in the void (with a void totem) what happens there you ask? Nobody knows, only one person returned back to the overworld.



# Installation
Put the jar file in your mods folder this mod also requires fabricAPI
